segments.text: Endow the king with your justice, O God, the royal son with your righteousness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May he judge your people in righteousness, your afflicted ones with justice.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May the mountains bring prosperity to the people, the hills the fruit of righteousness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May he defend the afflicted among the people and save the children of the needy; may he crush the oppressor.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May he endure as long as the sun, as long as the moon, through all generations.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May he be like rain falling on a mown field, like showers watering the earth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: In his days may the righteous flourish and prosperity abound till the moon is no more.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May he rule from sea to sea and from the River to the ends of the earth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May the desert tribes bow before him and his enemies lick the dust.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May the kings of Tarshish and of distant shores bring tribute to him. May the kings of Sheba and Seba present him gifts.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May all kings bow down to him and all nations serve him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For he will deliver the needy who cry out, the afflicted who have no one to help.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He will take pity on the weak and the needy and save the needy from death.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He will rescue them from oppression and violence, for precious is their blood in his sight.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Long may he live! May gold from Sheba be given him. May people ever pray for him and bless him all day long.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May grain abound throughout the land; on the tops of the hills may it sway. May the crops flourish like Lebanon and thrive like the grass of the field.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May his name endure forever; may it continue as long as the sun. Then all nations will be blessed through him, and they will call him blessed.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Praise be to the Lord God, the God of Israel, who alone does marvelous deeds.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Praise be to his glorious name forever; may the whole earth be filled with his glory. Amen and Amen.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: This concludes the prayers of David son of Jesse.
